title: Use Cloudflare Workers as runtime
constraints: MUST use Cloudflare Workers for all server-side code
MUST NOT use Vercel, AWS Lambda, or other FaaS providers
MUST NOT import @vercel/* packages
MUST serve static assets via Workers [assets] binding
MUST use E2B instead of Vercel Sandbox for code execution

title: GitHub-Native Project Management
constraints: MUST use GitHub Issues + Milestones + Labels for all project tracking
MUST NOT use external project management databases or services
MUST use gh CLI for all automation

title: Five-Layer Secret Prevention
constraints: MUST implement 5 independent secret prevention layers
MUST NOT hardcode secrets in source code or config files
MUST use Infisical for secret storage
MUST NOT commit .env, .dev.vars, or files containing secrets
MUST run ggshield scan before every commit

title: LiteLLM + Langfuse for Observability and Multi-Model Routing
constraints: SHOULD route agent dispatches through LiteLLM proxy when ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL is set
MUST NOT hardcode LiteLLM or Langfuse secrets in config files
SHOULD fall back to direct Anthropic API if LiteLLM is unavailable

title: Dependency Version Policy — Latest Unless Vulnerable
constraints: Use latest stable version of all dependencies
Pin to last-known-good version when latest has unpatched vulnerabilities
Never leave vulnerable production dependencies unaddressed

title: QA Ownership Model — Runners in zendev, Tests in Target Repo
constraints: Test files live in the target repo (OUT-REPO or imported repo), not in zendev
zendev owns test runners, story parser, scoring engine, and CI orchestration
Tests are project artifacts — evidence of quality that travels with the code
generate-tests.sh is idempotent — never overwrites user customizations

title: Greptile Review Gate Discipline
constraints: MUST NOT merge any PR without at least one completed Greptile review
MUST treat 0 reviews as 'not yet reviewed', never as 'approved'
MUST use exact login match (== 'greptile-apps[bot]') in jq filters, not startswith or contains
MUST distinguish bot login (greptile-apps[bot]) from mention trigger (@greptile-ai)
MUST verify file contents after replace_all operations for syntax artifacts

title: Three-Tier Agent Model (Opus / Sonnet / Haiku)
constraints: MUST dispatch agents at the correct model tier (opus/sonnet/haiku)
MUST NOT use opus for scout tasks
MUST delegate implementation from orchestrator to implementation agents

title: Compressed Agent Communication Protocol (CACP)
constraints: MUST begin agent responses with STATUS: line
SHOULD use structured CACP fields for machine-readable output

title: Hook Architecture — Python Hooks with Exit-Code Convention
constraints: MUST write all hooks in Python 3
MUST use exit code 2 to block tool calls
MUST use exit code 0 for advisory/pass-through hooks

title: E2B as Sandbox Provider
constraints: MUST use E2B as the sole sandbox provider
MUST NOT set SANDBOX_PROVIDER=vercel
MUST NOT import @vercel/* packages

title: CI-Only Deployments
constraints: MUST deploy only through CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions)
MUST NOT run wrangler deploy from local machines in agent sessions

title: ADR-0016: External Merkle Root Anchoring via Git Tags
Dispatch Modernization to Native CLI Primitives
constraints: MUST use --output-format json for all headless dispatch
MUST read model, effort, and budget from agent-tier-config.json
MUST NOT parse agent output with regex — use jq on JSON envelope

title: Knowledge Graph Extension — ADR Nodes in KuzuDB
constraints: MUST extend existing KuzuDB graph, not add a new database
MUST maintain JSON fallback for KuzuDB incompatibility
MUST NOT require Docker or external services
MUST handle heterogeneous ADR formats (rich and simple frontmatter)
MUST NOT touch Prophet_Trader's Qdrant or zendev-full infrastructure

title: ADR-0019: Daemon Precondition Gates — Architect-First, ADR-Gated Dispatch
